name: Peta
oneLineVibe: super fan of ducks and town history

publicTasks: Work on a duck-themed event element (history booth / tradition display).

dependencies.description: Coordinates with the merch person for materials or props.

pressurePoints.whatMakesHimFold: Rejection or disapproval from Amy strongly affects him.

goals.whatTheyWantFromDuckParty: Make people like ducks as much as he does.
goals.mayorGoalForThem: Prevent him from going overboard with the duck theme.

mildSecret.description: He knows 1–2 random NPC mild secrets.

rumorBehavior.notes: Doesn’t talk to many people besides Amy, but when he does, he’s usually accurate.
